inbound.subject: Starting over after a layoff
inbound.body: Hi coach, I want to get back to running after a messy few months. My big goal is to get healthy enough to race a half marathon again this spring. Right now I mostly need help rebuilding without doing something stupid.

outbound.subject: Re: Starting over after a layoff
outbound.text:
Hi there,
Thank you for sharing. I understand you’re starting over after a layoff and you’re aiming to race a half marathon this spring. You want a cautious, progressive rebuild to get healthy and avoid setbacks.
To tailor a safe intake and plan, I need one key detail: your time_availability. Specifically, how many days per week you can train and roughly how long you can devote to each session. If you’re unsure, a rough range is fine.
Once I have that, I’ll confirm the safe intake approach and the next steps, keeping things small and gradual to protect your health.
Please reply with your typical weekly availability.
Best,
Coach
outbound.html:
Hi there,

Thank you for sharing. I understand you’re starting over after a layoff and you’re aiming to race a half marathon this spring. You want a cautious, progressive rebuild to get healthy and avoid setbacks.

To tailor a safe intake and plan, I need one key detail: your time_availability. Specifically, how many days per week you can train and roughly how long you can devote to each session. If you’re unsure, a rough range is fine.

Once I have that, I’ll confirm the safe intake approach and the next steps, keeping things small and gradual to protect your health.

Please reply with your typical weekly availability.

Best,
Coach
